summary: Customer testimonial from Elizabeth-Anne (UK) about her 24-year-old ex-racehorse Bobby staying sound barefoot using Cavallo Sport Hoof Boots after shoe removal due to crumbly hoof walls.
Personal blog essay by Carole Herder recounting her childhood first encounter with a horse on the Canadian prairies and how it shaped her lifelong destiny with horses.
Blog post by Carole Herder introducing equine agility, a non-mounted ground-obstacle sport for horses, ponies and donkeys, including barefoot and transitioning horses.
Customer story from Dona Wolfe (USA) about a horse with a fractured coffin bone recovering after going barefoot, advocating hoof boots for tender hooves on all terrain.
Blog post by Carole Herder arguing domesticated horses suffer from unnatural diets and confinement, criticizing bean-based feeds and advocating holistic, natural horse care.
Blog post by Carole Herder on the 'first, do no harm' principle, citing Dr. Tomas Teskey on how barefoot hoof care preserves hoof function while shoes harm joints and circulation.
Customer testimonial from Katherine (Texas, USA) about Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots protecting competition horses' feet from stone bruises and wall chipping during drought.
Blog post by Carole Herder highlighting Cavallo-endorsed horsemen Monty Roberts, Dan James (Double Dan) and Guy McLean, their tour schedules and their use of Cavallo boots and pads.
Blog post by Carole Herder with a 10-question quiz defining the 'Cavallo Community' of horse owners, covering trail riding, natural holistic care and bonding with horses.
Customer testimonial from Judy (Australia) comparing hoof boot brands and praising Cavallo boots through endurance rides and managing her horse's laminitis on rocky ground.
Blog post by Carole Herder promoting trail-riding events from Best of America By Horseback and the American Competitive Trail Horse Association, with event links.
Blog post by Carole Herder recapping Cavallo's worldwide distributor gathering at the Spoga equine trade fair in Cologne, Germany, with partners from 28 countries.
